title: Integer overflow in ciphertext length calculation
problem: uint32_t ciphertextLen = plaintext->dataLen + blockSize; can overflow if plaintext->dataLen is close to UINT32_MAX, leading to buffer under-allocation and potential heap overflow.
code:
uint32_t ciphertextLen = plaintext->dataLen + blockSize;
uint8_t *ciphertext = BSL_SAL_Malloc(ciphertextLen);

title: Integer overflow in plaintext length calculation
problem: uint32_t maxPlaintextLen = encInfo->encryptedContent.dataLen + blockSize; can overflow, leading to buffer under-allocation and potential heap overflow during decryption.
code:
uint32_t maxPlaintextLen = encInfo->encryptedContent.dataLen + blockSize;
uint8_t *plaintextData = BSL_SAL_Malloc(maxPlaintextLen);

title: Integer overflow in streaming encrypt update buffer allocation
problem: Multiple unchecked additions that can overflow: uint32_t newDataLen = input->dataLen + blockSize; uint32_t totalLen = currentLen + newDataLen;

title: Integer overflow in streaming decrypt update buffer allocation
problem: Multiple unchecked additions that can overflow: uint32_t maxOutLen = input->dataLen + blockSize; uint32_t totalOutLen = curOutLen + maxOutLen;
code:
uint32_t maxOutLen = input->dataLen + blockSize;
uint32_t totalOutLen = curOutLen + maxOutLen;

title: Integer overflow in FinalizeEncry buffer reallocation
problem: uint32_t totalLen = currentLen + blockSize; can overflow, leading to heap corruption.
code:
uint32_t totalLen = currentLen + blockSize;
uint8_t *newBuf = BSL_SAL_Realloc(envData->encryptedContentInfo.encryptedContent.data, totalLen, currentLen);

title: Integer overflow in DecryptFinal buffer reallocation
problem: uint32_t totalLen = currentLen + blockSize; can overflow, leading to heap corruption.
code:
uint32_t totalLen = currentLen + blockSize;
uint8_t *newBuf = BSL_SAL_Realloc(output->data, totalLen, currentLen);

title: Integer overflow in TransferAccumulatedData buffer reallocation
problem: uint32_t newOutLen = curOutLen + accDataLen; can overflow, leading to heap corruption.
code:
uint32_t newOutLen = curOutLen + accDataLen;
uint8_t *newBuf = BSL_SAL_Realloc(output->data, newOutLen, curOutLen);

title: Potential null pointer dereference in BufferEquals
problem: The function checks if struct pointers a and b are NULL, but not if a->data or b->data are NULL before calling memcmp. memcmp with NULL pointers is undefined behavior.

title: Potential null pointer dereference in MatchRecipientIdByData
problem: The function calls BufferEquals with pointers whose data fields may be NULL if HITLS_X509_CertCtrl fails or returns data with NULL pointers.
